zh.lifeSummary: Henri I de BOURBOURG是Thémard de BOURBOURG和Livilde的兒子，於1001年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛。他於大約1030年與Sibilla Rose Guines在法國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1045年之後在法國米迪-列內斯羅特布爾布，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henri I de BOURBOURG是Thémard de BOURBOURG和Livilde的儿子，于1001年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛。他于大约1030年与Sibilla Rose Guines在法国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1045年之后在法国米迪-列內斯羅特布爾布，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Henri I de BOURBOURG was born in 1001, in Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France as the son of Thémard de BOURBOURG and Livilde. He married Sibilla Rose Guines about 1030, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died after 1045, in Bourbou, Lot, Midi-Pyrénées, France, and was buried in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Henri I de BOURBOURG est né en 1001, à Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, fils de Thémard de BOURBOURG et Livilde. Il a épousé Sibilla Rose Guines environ 1030, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1045, à Bourbou, Lot, Midi-Pyrénées, France, et a été enterré à Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Henri I de BOURBOURG wurde 1001 in Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich, als Sohn von Thémard de BOURBOURG und Livilde geboren. Er hat um 1030 in Frankreich Sibilla Rose Guines geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1045 in Bourbou, Lot, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Henri I de BOURBOURG è nato il nel 1001 nel Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia come figlio di Thémard de BOURBOURG e Livilde. Lui sposato Sibilla Rose Guines circa 1030, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1045, nel Bourbou, Lot, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, e fu sepolto a Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Henri I de BOURBOURGは1001年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンでThémard de BOURBOURGとLivildeの息子として生まれた。約1030年にフランスでSibilla Rose Guinesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1045年以後にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスロトボウルボウで死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-オマーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri I de BOURBOURG(은)는 1001년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 로트-트-가니에서 Thémard de BOURBOURG(와)과 Livilde의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1030년 프랑스에서 Sibilla Rose Guines(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1045년 이후 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 로트 부르보우에서 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henri I de BOURBOURG nasceu em 1001, em Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França filho de Thémard de BOURBOURG e Livilde. Ele casou-se com Sibilla Rose Guines aproximadamente 1030, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1045, em Bourbou, Lot, Midi-Pyrénées, França, e foi sepultado em Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Henri I de BOURBOURG родился в 1001 г. в местности лот-ет-гаронн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. Его родителей звали Thémard de BOURBOURG и Livilde. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibilla Rose Guines около 1030 г. в местности Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер после 1045 г. в местности бурбоу, лот, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция и был похоронен в местности сеинт-омир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Henri I de BOURBOURG nació en 1001, en Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia como hijo de Thémard de BOURBOURG y Livilde. Se casó con Sibilla Rose Guines aproximadamente 1030, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió después de 1045, en Bourbou, Lot, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, y fue sepultado en Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
